schema.appDescription: Calculate EPF corpus at retirement. Enter basic salary, years of service, and EPF rate to see total EPF accumulation including employer and employee contributions.

inputs.label: Monthly Basic + DA (₹)
inputs.hint: EPF is calculated on Basic + DA

howToSteps.name: Enter your details
howToSteps.text: Fill in the input fields for the EPF Calculator. Smart defaults are pre-filled.

howToSteps.name: View instant results
howToSteps.text: Results update in real time — no submit button needed.

howToSteps.name: Explore breakdown
howToSteps.text: Open the year-by-year breakdown to see numbers over time.

howToSteps.name: Compare scenarios
howToSteps.text: Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the best option.

faq.q: What is the EPF interest rate for FY 2025-26?
faq.a: The EPFO board has recommended 8.25% p.a. for FY 2025-26, same as FY 2024-25. EPF interest is calculated monthly but credited annually. Interest on employee share up to ₹2.5 lakh contribution/year is tax-free; above ₹2.5 lakh it's taxable.

faq.q: How much does the employer contribute to EPF?
faq.a: The employer contributes 12% of basic+DA. Of this: 3.67% goes to EPF (employee account) and 8.33% goes to EPS (Employee Pension Scheme). For basic salaries above ₹15,000, the EPS contribution is capped at 8.33% of ₹15,000 = ₹1,250/month.

Full EPF withdrawal: 2 months after leaving employment (non-retirement). Partial withdrawal: allowed for house purchase (up to 90% after 5 years), marriage/education (50% after 7 years), medical (limited). Tax-free if employed for 5+ continuous years. Premature withdrawal before 5 years attracts TDS.
Yes, completely free on CalcPhi with no registration.
No. All calculations run in your browser. Your data is never stored.
Yes. Works on all modern smartphones and tablets.

examples.heading: ₹30,000 basic salary — 25 years EPF accumulation
examples.text: ₹30,000 basic at 8.25% for 25 years: Employee contribution 12% = ₹3,600/month. Employer EPF 3.67% = ₹1,101/month. Total EPF contribution = ₹4,701/month. EPF corpus ≈ ₹48.9 lakh at 8.25%. Total invested ≈ ₹14.1 lakh.

examples.heading: High earner — VPF impact
examples.text: Adding VPF (Voluntary PF) of ₹10,000/month on top of mandatory EPF significantly grows the tax-free corpus. ₹10,000/month VPF for 25 years at 8.25% = additional ₹24.5 lakh. Total EPF+VPF corpus: ₹73+ lakh — all tax-free if held for 5+ years.
